description: Benny Mbwale is a professional painter based in Cape Town with years of experience in both interior and exterior painting. Known for his attention to detail, clean finish, and friendly manner in your home. He has worked on everything from residential repaints to commercial buildings - always with Plascon Pro, always on time.

services.name: Interior Painting
services.desc: Walls, ceilings, trims - full interior repaint

services.name: Touch-ups and Repairs
services.desc: Crack repairs, patching, single room touch-ups

testimonial_text: Benny was easily the most diligent, most professional painter - dedicated the most attention to detail while maintaining a constantly friendly presence in our home. He befriended the children and provided the most exceptional service. I could give no stronger recommendation.

description: Sipho has been fixing pipes, installing geysers and sorting blocked drains in Mitchells Plain for over 15 years. Fast response, honest pricing, and he cleans up after himself.
tagline: Fast, reliable plumbing in Mitchells Plain

services.name: Geyser Repair
services.desc: Fix or replace your geyser fast

services.name: Leak Fix
services.desc: Burst pipes, leaking taps, drain blockages

testimonial_text: Sipho came within an hour. Fixed my burst pipe and cleaned up after. Proper professional.

description: Thandi is a qualified electrician serving Khayelitsha and surrounding areas. She handles everything from fault finding to full DB board upgrades and provides certificates of compliance.

services.name: DB Board Upgrades
services.desc: Full DB board replacement and upgrade

services.name: Plug and Light Points
services.desc: New plug, switch and light installations

testimonial_text: Thandi sorted out my DB board same day. Neat work, certificates provided. Will use again.
